Part.Source:
&IsFalhaArquivo = false
&NfeArqXml = '' &XmlReader.Open(&CaminhoArquivoXml) Do While not &XmlReader.EOF &NfeArqXml += &XmlReader.ReadRawXML() &XmlReader.Read() Enddo &XmlReader.Close()
LeituraXmlNFSeNacional.Call(&NfeArqXml, '', &OutXmlCompNFse_LongVarchar) &sdtNFSeNacional.FromXml(&OutXmlCompNFse_LongVarchar) &NfsNum = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.nDFSe)
if &NfsNum <= 0 //NFSe Nacional Valida LeituraXmlNFSe.Call(&NfeArqXml, '', &OutXmlCompNFse_LongVarchar, &IsGravar) &CompNFSe.FromXml(&OutXmlCompNFse_LongVarchar) Endif
Do CAse CAse &NfsNum > 0 //NFSe Nacional Valida &NFsTipNF = 'S' //Nacional
retornaSoNumeros.Call(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.prest.CNPJ, &ForCNPJ) If &ForCNPJ.IsEmpty() retornaSoNumeros.Call(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.prest.CPF, &ForCNPJ) EndIF
retornaSoNumeros.Call(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.toma.CNPJ, &PesCnpj) If &PesCnpj.IsEmpty() retornaSoNumeros.Call(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.toma.CPF, &PesCnpj) EndIF
Case not &CompNFSe.Nfse.Numero.IsEmpty() retornaSoNumeros.Call(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Prestador.CpfCnpj.Cnpj, &ForCNPJ) If &ForCNPJ.IsEmpty() retornaSoNumeros.Call(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Prestador.CpfCnpj.Cpf, &ForCNPJ) EndIF
retornaSoNumeros.Call(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.IdentificacaoTomador.CpfCnpj.Cnpj, &PesCnpj) If &PesCnpj.IsEmpty() retornaSoNumeros.Call(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.IdentificacaoTomador.CpfCnpj.Cpf, &PesCnpj) EndIF Otherwise &IsFalhaArquivo = true EndCAse
&IsNotaPropria = '' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod
retornaSoNumeros.Call(FilCpj, &FilCpj)
Do CAse CAse &FilCpj = &ForCNPJ &IsNotaPropria = 'P' &FilCod = FilCod Exit
Case &FilCpj = &PesCnpj &IsNotaPropria = 'T' &FilCod = FilCod Exit EndCase EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &Wwpcontext.FilCod Where PedCod = &tmpPedCod
&LctCod = LctCod
Exit EndFor
new tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod tmpNfeDtaMod = serverdate() tmpNfeArqXml = &NfeArqXml tmpNfeNFSe = 'NFSE' tmpEmpCod = &EmpCod If &FilCod.IsEmpty() tmpFilCod = 1 tmpNfeFatFilCod = 1 Else tmpFilCod = &FilCod tmpNfeFatFilCod = &FilCod EndIF
tmpPedCod = &tmpPedCod
//DADOS NFE if &NFsTipNF = 'S' &dhEmi = substr(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dhProc ,9,2) +'/'+ Substr(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dhProc,6,2) +'/'+ Substr(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dhProc,1,4) tmpNfeChv = RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.Id) tmpNfeNum = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.nNFSe) tmpNfeSer = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.serie Else &dhEmi = substr(&CompNFSe.nfse.DataEmissao ,9,2) +'/'+ Substr(&CompNFSe.nfse.DataEmissao,6,2) +'/'+ Substr(&CompNFSe.nfse.DataEmissao,1,4) tmpNfeChv = &CompNFSe.ChaveAcesso tmpNfeNum = val(&CompNFSe.Nfse.Numero) Endif
tmpNfeDtaEms = CtoD(&dhEmi) tmpNfeDtaDsp = serverdate()
// tmpModCod = &TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.mod // tmpNfeFin.FromString(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.finNFe.ToString())
Do Case Case &IsNotaPropria = 'P' tmpNfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA tmpImpEntSai = '1' //&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.tpNF tmpLctCod = 2
Case &IsNotaPropria = 'T' tmpNfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS Do CAse Case &FilCod = 0 tmpImpEntSai = '3' tmpLctCod = 0 Case &FilCod > 0 tmpImpEntSai = '0' tmpLctCod = 1 // Case &TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.tpNF = '0' // tmpImpEntSai = '1' //// tmpLctCod = 2 EndCAse EndCase
if &LctCod.IsEmpty() &LctCod = tmpLctCod Else tmpLctCod = &LctCod Endif
// tmpTotFrt = val(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vFrete) // tmpTotOut = val(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vOutro) // tmpTotPro = val(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vProd) // tmpTotBasIcm = val(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vBC) // tmpTotBasSt = val(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vBCST) // tmpTotNFe = val(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vNF)
if &NfsTipNF = 'S' &PesCpf = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.prest.CPF &PesCnpj = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.prest.CNPJ Else &PesCpf = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Prestador.CpfCnpj.Cpf &PesCnpj = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Prestador.CpfCnpj.Cnpj Endif
&FormatadoPesCpf = &PesCpf RetornaSoNumeros.Call(&PesCpf, &PesCpf) if not &FormatadoPesCpf.IsEmpty() ValidaCpfCnpj.Call(&FormatadoPesCpf, &Erro, 'N') EndIF
&FormatadoPesCnpj = &PesCnpj RetornaSoNumeros.Call(&PesCnpj, &PesCnpj) if not &FormatadoPesCnpj.IsEmpty() ValidaCpfCnpj.Call(&FormatadoPesCnpj, &Erro, 'N') EndIF
tmpPedCliCnpj = &PesCnpj tmpPedCliCpf = &PesCpf
&PEsCod = 0 do 'getFornecedor' tmpEmixNom = &PesRaz tmpEmixCod = &PEsCod
If tmpPedCliCpf.Trim().IsEmpty() tmpEmixCpfCnpj = tmpPedCliCnpj Else tmpEmixCpfCnpj = tmpPedCliCpf EndIf // //TRANSPORTADORA
//TOMADOR if &NFsTipNF = 'S' &PesCpf = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.toma.CPF &PesCnpj = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.toma.CNPJ Else &PesCpf = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.IdentificacaoTomador.CpfCnpj.Cpf &PesCnpj = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.IdentificacaoTomador.CpfCnpj.Cnpj Endif
&FormatadoPesCpf = &PesCpf RetornaSoNumeros.Call(&PesCpf, &PesCpf) if not &FormatadoPesCpf.IsEmpty() ValidaCpfCnpj.Call(&FormatadoPesCpf, &Erro, 'N') EndIF
&FormatadoPesCnpj = &PesCnpj RetornaSoNumeros.Call(&PesCnpj, &PesCnpj) if not &FormatadoPesCnpj.IsEmpty() ValidaCpfCnpj.Call(&FormatadoPesCnpj, &Erro, 'N') EndIF
tmpDestxCpf = &PesCpf tmpDestxCNPJ = &PesCnpj
&PEsCod = 0 if &NFsTipNF = 'S' tmpDestxNom = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.toma.xNome tmpAutNfeDadAdi =&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.serv.infoCompl.xInfComp Else tmpDestxNom = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.RazaoSocial Endif do 'getFornecedor' tmpDestxCod = &PEsCod
tmpStsNF = 'N' VerificaNotaJahLancadaNFSe.Call(&EmpCod, tmpNfeFatFilCod, tmpNfeProTer, tmpEmixCod, tmpNfeNum, &auxNfeCod) if &auxNfeCod > 0 &tmpNfeFatFilCod = tmpNfeFatFilCod do 'getTipoLancamento' tmpLctCod = &tmpLctCod tmpStsNF = 'S' EndIF EndNew
commit
&tmpNfeItmCod = 0
if &NFsTipNF = 'S'
//PRODUTOS NFE &ProCod = 0 &ProGraCod = 0 &ProRef = '' &ProNom = '' &tmpProNcmCod = 0 &tmpProBar = '' &tmpProQtdCmpEmb = 0 &ForProCod = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.serv.cServ.cTribNac &ForProNom = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.xTribNac
Do CAse CAse &IsNotaPropria = 'P' do 'getProdutoProprio' Case &IsNotaPropria = 'T' or &IsNotaPropria.IsEmpty() do 'getProdutoFornecedor' EndCAse
New tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod tmpProForCod = &ForProCod.ToUpper() tmpNfeItmCod = &tmpNfeItmCod + 1 tmpProRef = &ProRef tmpProNomERP = &ProNom tmpProNom = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.serv.cServ.xDescServ tmpNfeProDadAdi = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.serv.infoCompl.xInfComp tmpNcmCod = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.serv.cServ.cNBS) //tmpNcmCEST = &det.prod.CEST //tmpCFOP = &det.prod.CFOP tmpProNcmCod = &tmpProNcmCod //tmpProBar = &tmpProBar
tmpProQtdCmpEmb = 1
//tmpUndTrib = &det.prod.uTrib.ToUpper() //tmpPedVlrUntTrib = val(&det.prod.vUnTrib) tmpPedQtdTrib = 1
//tmpUnd = &det.prod.uCom.ToUpper() tmpProCod = &ProCod tmpProGraCod = &ProGraCod tmpPedVlrUnt = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.valores.vLiq)
tmpProSolLot = Status_SimNao.Nao
tmpPedVlrTot = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.valores.vLiq) tmpPedQtd = 1 tmpPedVlrDsc = 0
//&NfeProBasIcms.SetEmpty() //&NfeProVlrIcms.SetEmpty() //&NFeProTaxIcms.SetEmpty()
//&NfeProBasIcmsSt.SetEmpty() //&NfeProTaxIcmsSt.SetEmpty() //&NfeProVlrImcsSt.SetEmpty()
//&NfeProBasIcmsSt.SetEmpty() //&NfeProTaxMvaSt.SetEmpty()
//&NfeProTaxRedIcmsSt.SetEmpty() //&NfeProTaxRedIcms.SetEmpty()
//&tmpProBasFCPIcmsSt.SetEmpty() //&tmpProVlrFCPIcmsSt.SetEmpty() //&tmpProTaxFCPIcmsSt.SetEmpty()
//tmpProBasVlrIcm = &NfeProBasIcms //tmpProVlrIcm = &NfeProVlrIcms //tmpProPerIcm = &NFeProTaxIcms //tmpProBasVlrIcmSt = &NfeProBasIcmsSt //tmpProPerIcmSt = &NfeProTaxIcmsSt //tmpProVlrIcmSt = &NfeProVlrImcsSt //tmpNfeProTaxMvaSt = &NfeProTaxMvaSt //tmpProPerRedIcmSt = &NfeProTaxRedIcmsSt //tmpProPerRedIcm = &NfeProTaxRedIcms //tmpProBasFCPIcmsSt = &tmpProBasFCPIcmsSt //tmpProVlrFCPIcmsSt = &tmpProVlrFCPIcmsSt //tmpProTaxFCPIcmsSt = &tmpProTaxFCPIcmsSt EndNew
Commit Else For &SdtnfseItem in &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.ListaItensServicoItem //PRODUTOS NFE &ProCod = 0 &ProGraCod = 0 &ProRef = '' &ProNom = '' &tmpProNcmCod = 0 &tmpProBar = '' &tmpProQtdCmpEmb = 0 &ForProCod = &SdtnfseItem.ItemListaServico &ForProNom = &SdtnfseItem.Descricao
Do CAse CAse &IsNotaPropria = 'P' do 'getProdutoProprio' Case &IsNotaPropria = 'T' or &IsNotaPropria.IsEmpty() do 'getProdutoFornecedor' EndCAse
New tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod tmpProForCod = &ForProCod.ToUpper() tmpNfeItmCod = &tmpNfeItmCod + 1 tmpProRef = &ProRef tmpProNomERP = &ProNom tmpProNom = &SdtnfseItem.Descricao tmpNcmCod = val(&SdtnfseItem.ItemListaServico) //tmpNcmCEST = &det.prod.CEST //tmpCFOP = &det.prod.CFOP tmpProNcmCod = &tmpProNcmCod //tmpProBar = &tmpProBar
tmpProQtdCmpEmb = 1
//tmpUndTrib = &det.prod.uTrib.ToUpper() //tmpPedVlrUntTrib = val(&det.prod.vUnTrib) tmpPedQtdTrib = val(&SdtnfseItem.Quantidade)
//tmpUnd = &det.prod.uCom.ToUpper() tmpProCod = &ProCod tmpProGraCod = &ProGraCod tmpPedVlrUnt = val(&SdtnfseItem.ValorUnitario)
tmpProSolLot = Status_SimNao.Nao
tmpPedVlrTot = val(&SdtnfseItem.ValorLiquido) tmpPedQtd = val(&SdtnfseItem.Quantidade) tmpPedVlrDsc = val(&SdtnfseItem.ValorDesconto)
//&NfeProBasIcms.SetEmpty() //&NfeProVlrIcms.SetEmpty() //&NFeProTaxIcms.SetEmpty()
//&NfeProBasIcmsSt.SetEmpty() //&NfeProTaxIcmsSt.SetEmpty() //&NfeProVlrImcsSt.SetEmpty()
//&NfeProBasIcmsSt.SetEmpty() //&NfeProTaxMvaSt.SetEmpty()
//&NfeProTaxRedIcmsSt.SetEmpty() //&NfeProTaxRedIcms.SetEmpty()
//&tmpProBasFCPIcmsSt.SetEmpty() //&tmpProVlrFCPIcmsSt.SetEmpty() //&tmpProTaxFCPIcmsSt.SetEmpty()
//tmpProBasVlrIcm = &NfeProBasIcms //tmpProVlrIcm = &NfeProVlrIcms //tmpProPerIcm = &NFeProTaxIcms //tmpProBasVlrIcmSt = &NfeProBasIcmsSt //tmpProPerIcmSt = &NfeProTaxIcmsSt //tmpProVlrIcmSt = &NfeProVlrImcsSt //tmpNfeProTaxMvaSt = &NfeProTaxMvaSt //tmpProPerRedIcmSt = &NfeProTaxRedIcmsSt //tmpProPerRedIcm = &NfeProTaxRedIcms //tmpProBasFCPIcmsSt = &tmpProBasFCPIcmsSt //tmpProVlrFCPIcmsSt = &tmpProVlrFCPIcmsSt //tmpProTaxFCPIcmsSt = &tmpProTaxFCPIcmsSt EndNEw
commit EndFor Endif
sub 'getTipoLancamento' For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where NfsCod = &auxNfeCod
&tmpLctCod = NfsLctCod
Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'getFornecedor' &PEsCod.SetEmpty() &PesRaz.SetEmpty() if not &PesCpf.IsEmpty() or not &PesCnpj.IsEmpty() For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCnpj = &PesCnpj or PesCnpj = &FormatadoPesCnpj when &PesCpf.IsEmpty() Where PesCpf = &PesCpf or PesCpf = &FormatadoPesCpf when &PesCnpj.IsEmpty() &PEsCod = PesCod &PesRaz = PesRaz Exit EndFor Endif EndSub
Sub 'getProdutoProprio' &IsAchou = false For Each Order EmpCod, ForCNPJ, ForProCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ForCNPJ = &PesCnpj Where ForProCod = &ForProCod &ProRef = ForErpProRef do 'GetProduto' Exit when none For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod, ProForCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProForNumCpfCpnj = &PesCnpj Where ProForProCod = &ForProCod &ProRef = ProRef do 'GetProduto' Exit EndFor
if &IsAchou = false //Verifica Codigo barras if &ForProGraBar <> 'SEM GTIN' &ProRef = &ForProGraBar //= &det.prod.cEAN do 'GetProduto' Endif Endif
if &IsAchou = false //&ProRef = &ForProCod //= &det.prod.cProd //do 'GetProduto' &ProRef = '' For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod, ProGraCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProNom = &ForProNom &ProNom = ProNomGra &ProRef = ProGraRef &ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod &tmpProQtdCmpEmb = ProQtdCmpEmb &tmpProNcmCod = NcmCod &tmpProBar = ProBar
Exit EndFor Endif EndFor EndSub
Sub 'getProdutoFornecedor' &IsAchou = false For Each Order EmpCod, ForCNPJ, ForProCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ForCNPJ = &ForCNPJ Where ForProCod = &ForProCod &ProRef = ForErpProRef do 'GetProduto' Exit when none For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod, ProForCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProForNumCpfCpnj = &ForCNPJ Where ProForProCod = &ForProCod &ProRef = ProRef do 'GetProduto' Exit EndFor
if &IsAchou = false //Verifica Codigo barras if &ForProGraBar <> 'SEM GTIN' &ProRef = &ForProGraBar //= &det.prod.cEAN do 'GetProduto' Endif Endif
if &IsAchou = false //&ProRef = &ForProCod //= &det.prod.cProd //do 'GetProduto' &ProRef = '' For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod, ProGraCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProNom = &ForProNom &ProNom = ProNomGra &ProRef = ProGraRef &ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod &tmpProQtdCmpEmb = ProQtdCmpEmb &tmpProNcmCod = NcmCod &tmpProBar = ProBar
Exit EndFor Endif EndFor EndSub
Sub 'GetProduto' &IsAchou = false RetornaProdutoReferencia.Call(&EmpCod, &ProRef, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &ProNom, &IsAchou, &ProReqVlr, &ProReqQTd, &ProBarQtd, &ErroMensagem) For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod, ProGraCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where ProGraCod = &ProGraCod &ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod &ProNom = ProNomGra &tmpProQtdCmpEmb = ProQtdCmpEmb &tmpProNcmCod = NcmCod &tmpProBar = ProBar &ProRef = ProGraRef &IsAchou = true Exit EndFor EndSub
